description: lib.rs:192-304 — Tests cover: URI happy path, two distinct URI error paths (wrong backend, empty key), get/put/refresh CRUD, missing key → NotFound, overwrite semantics, clone-shares-state (verifies Arc sharing), Debug redaction (negative assertion on secret content), and global store roundtrip with cleanup. The test structure mirrors the public API surface completely. The global store test cleans up after itself to avoid poisoning other tests sharing the static.
title: Good: Test coverage is thorough and well-structured
